regressions.reasoning: Stage_05 legitimately fixed TLS for demo.example.com — the same hostname stage_01 created an HTTP ingress for. Once TLS is properly configured, ingress-nginx's default ssl-redirect behavior causes HTTP requests to return 308 to HTTPS, so stage_01's HTTP oracle check is rendered stale by an intentional later change to the same ingress resource.
